original_query: select supp_nation, cust_nation, l_year, sum(volume) as revenue from ( select n1.n_name as supp_nation, n2.n_name as cust_nation, extract(year from l_shipdate) as l_year, l_extendedprice * (1 - l_discount) as volume from supplier, lineitem, orders, customer, nation n1, nation n2 where s_suppkey = l_suppkey and o_orderkey = l_orderkey and c_custkey = o_custkey and s_nationkey = n1.n_nationkey and c_nationkey = n2.n_nationkey and ( (n1.n_name = 'ETHIOPIA' and n2.n_name = 'FRANCE') or (n1.n_name = 'FRANCE' and n2.n_name = 'ETHIOPIA') ) and l_shipdate between date '1995-01-01' and date '1996-12-31' ) as shipping group by supp_nation, cust_nation, l_year order by supp_nation, cust_nation, l_year;
rewritten_query:
SELECT supp_nation, cust_nation, l_year, SUM(volume) AS revenue
FROM (
    SELECT 
        n1.n_name AS supp_nation,
        n2.n_name AS cust_nation,
        EXTRACT(year FROM l_shipdate) AS l_year,
        l_extendedprice * (1 - l_discount) AS volume
    FROM supplier
    INNER JOIN nation n1 ON supplier.s_nationkey = n1.n_nationkey AND n1.n_name = 'ETHIOPIA'
    INNER JOIN lineitem ON supplier.s_suppkey = lineitem.l_suppkey
    INNER JOIN orders ON lineitem.l_orderkey = orders.o_orderkey
    INNER JOIN customer ON orders.o_custkey = customer.c_custkey
    INNER JOIN nation n2 ON customer.c_nationkey = n2.n_nationkey AND n2.n_name = 'FRANCE'
    WHERE l_shipdate BETWEEN DATE '1995-01-01' AND DATE '1996-12-31'
    UNION ALL
    SELECT 
        n1.n_name AS supp_nation,
        n2.n_name AS cust_nation,
        EXTRACT(year FROM l_shipdate) AS l_year,
        l_extendedprice * (1 - l_discount) AS volume
    FROM supplier
    INNER JOIN nation n1 ON supplier.s_nationkey = n1.n_nationkey AND n1.n_name = 'FRANCE'
    INNER JOIN lineitem ON supplier.s_suppkey = lineitem.l_suppkey
    INNER JOIN orders ON lineitem.l_orderkey = orders.o_orderkey
    INNER JOIN customer ON orders.o_custkey = customer.c_custkey
    INNER JOIN nation n2 ON customer.c_nationkey = n2.n_nationkey AND n2.n_name = 'ETHIOPIA'
    WHERE l_shipdate BETWEEN DATE '1995-01-01' AND DATE '1996-12-31'
) AS shipping
GROUP BY supp_nation, cust_nation, l_year
ORDER BY supp_nation, cust_nation, l_year

rewrite_suggestion.produced_suggestion: Replaced the OR condition with UNION ALL to split into two separate queries, each with specific nation filters
Replaced implicit joins (comma-separated tables) with explicit INNER JOIN syntax for better readability and potentially better optimizer understanding
Applied nation filters early in each UNION branch to reduce the number of rows processed in subsequent joins
